dashboard.profileComplete: Your profile is {{percent}}% complete — finish it to unlock better matches.

nudge.title: It's been {{days}} days without an offer
nudge.body: A short training on income types has helped candidates in your field land roles faster.

noMatchedJobs.title: No jobs matching your skills right now
noMatchedJobs.body: We'll notify you the moment a matching role opens up. Meanwhile, the startups and community roles below can build experience toward it.

noMatchedStartups.title: No startups matching your skills right now
noMatchedStartups.body: We'll surface a startup idea here as soon as one matches your skills. Meanwhile, explore what's already posted.

communityBanner.title: Curious about community income?
communityBanner.body: Watch a 4-minute explainer, then tell us you're interested.

dashboard.mockInterviewsBody: Practice on camera and review your recorded sessions anytime.

profile.skillsBody: Technical or soft — these power matches across jobs, partnerships, and community roles.
profile.addSkillPlaceholder: Add a skill and press enter
profile.lifeGoalsBody: Shared with startups when you apply for a partnership.
profile.workCulturePlaceholder: What ethics and work culture matter most to you?

addDetails.title: Add missing details
addDetails.subtitle: Finish these to unlock better job, partnership, and community matches.
addDetails.goalsDescription: Shared with startups when you apply for a partnership — helps them assess fit beyond your resume.
addDetails.mobileDescription: Verify your number so employers and startups can reach you and you receive OTP logins.
addDetails.prefsDescription: Helps us match jobs, partnerships, and community roles to how you want to work.

applications.title: My applications
applications.subtitle: Track every job and partnership application in one place.

free.name: Free
features: Apply to jobs, partnerships & community roles

plus.name: Plus
features: Featured listing when you post an idea

pro.name: Pro
features: Unlimited mock interviews with detailed feedback
Early access to new partnership listings

mockInterview.title: Mock interviews
mockInterview.subtitle: Practice on camera, then review your recorded sessions anytime.
mockInterview.limitsNotice: You can record up to 3 sessions, each up to 20 minutes — recording stops automatically at the 20-minute mark.
mockInterview.autoStopped: Recording stopped automatically at 20 minutes and was saved.
mockInterview.cameraUnavailable: Camera unavailable — check your browser permissions.
mockInterview.readyToStart: Start a session to get your first question.
mockInterview.uploadError: Couldn't save your recording. Please try again.
mockInterview.noSessions: You haven't recorded any mock interviews yet.
mockInterview.playbackError: Couldn't load this recording. Please try again.
mockInterview.deleteConfirm: Delete this recording? This can't be undone.
mockInterview.deleteError: Couldn't delete this recording. Please try again.
